title: Uma Little Maid
description: Enhance the little maid with the "Umamusume Soul".
body:
# Uma Little Maid
This is a Minecraft mod that is the addon of [Umapyoi](https://modrinth.com/mod/umapyoi) & [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) .  
## Description
This mod add only 1 function: Could equip the Umapyoi's Umamusme Soul to TLM's maid.  
The maid will be changed to "umamusume" and be enhanced, but most of the umamusume's skills and features are unavailable.  
## Screenshot
![ScreenShot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e6cf1bf81994645d9f2087cd05707c6a9bf0a53.png)
![ScreenShot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e71a8d0540491e955cc799f8b4ef34d335166f6.png)
## Credits
Cygames: Launched the Umamusume Project.  
TartaricAcid: Made the [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid).
